The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    11	    ;
    12	
    13	postfixExpression
    14	    :   primaryExpression
    15	    |   postfixExpression LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    16	    |   postfixExpression LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	    ;
    18	
    19	argumentExpressionList
    20	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    21	    ;
    22	
    23	unaryExpression
    24	    :
    25	    (postfixExpression
    26	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    27	    )
    28	    ;
    29	
    30	unaryOperator
    31	    :   Plus | Minus | Exclaim
    32	    ;
    33	
    34	multiplicativeExpression
    35	    :   unaryExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) unaryExpression)*
    36	    ;
    37	
    38	additiveExpression
    39	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    40	    ;
    41	
    42	relationalExpression
    43	    :   additiveExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) additiveExpression)*
    44	    ;
    45	
    46	equalityExpression
    47	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|ExclaimEqual) relationalExpression)*
    48	    ;
    49	
    50	logicalAndExpression
    51	    :   equalityExpression (AmpAmp equalityExpression)*
    52	    ;
    53	
    54	logicalOrExpression
    55	    :   logicalAndExpression (PipePipe logicalAndExpression)*
    56	    ;
    57	
    58	assignmentExpression
    59	    :   logicalOrExpression
    60	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    61	    ;
    62	
    63	expression
    64	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    65	    ;
    66	
    67	
    68	declaration
    69	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    70	    ;
    71	
    72	declarationSpecifiers
    73	    :   declarationSpecifier+
    74	    ;
    75	
    76	declarationSpecifier
    77	    :   typeSpecifier
    78	    |   typeQualifier
    79	    ;
    80	
    81	typeSpecifier
    82	    :   Int
    83	    |   Void
    84	    ;
    85	
    86	typeQualifier
    87	    :   Const
    88	    ;
    89	
    90	initDeclaratorList
    91	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*
    92	    ;
    93	
    94	initDeclarator
    95	    :   declarator (Equal initializer)?
    96	    ;
    97	
    98	
    99	declarator
   100	    :   directDeclarator
   101	    ;
   102	
   103	directDeclarator
   104	    :   Identifier
   105	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket
   106	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen
   107	    ;
   108	
   109	parameterList
   110	    :   parameterDeclaration (Comma parameterDeclaration)*
   111	    ;
   112	
   113	parameterDeclaration
   114	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator
   115	    ;
   116	
   117	identifierList
   118	    :   Identifier (Comma Identifier)*
   119	    ;
   120	
   121	initializer
   122	    :   assignmentExpression
   123	    |   LeftBrace initializerList? Comma? RightBrace
   124	    ;
   125	
   126	initializerList
   127	    :   initializer (Comma initializer)*
   128	    ;
   129	
   130	statement
   131	    :   compoundStatement
   132	    |   expressionStatement
   133	    |   selectionStatement
   134	    |   iterationStatement
   135	    |   jumpStatement
   136	    ;
   137	
   138	selectionStatement
   139	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   140	    ;
   141	
   142	iterationStatement
   143	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   144	    ;
   145	
   146	compoundStatement
   147	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   148	    ;
   149	
   150	blockItemList
   151	    :   blockItem+
   152	    ;
   153	
   154	blockItem
   155	    :   statement
   156	    |   declaration
   157	    ;
   158	
   159	expressionStatement
   160	    :   expression? Semi
   161	    ;
   162	
   163	jumpStatement
   164	    :   (Return expression? | Break | Continue)
   165	    Semi
   166	    ;
   167	
   168	compilationUnit
   169	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   170	    ;
   171	
   172	translationUnit
   173	    :   externalDeclaration+
   174	    ;
   175	
   176	externalDeclaration
   177	    :   functionDefinition
   178	    |   declaration
   179	    ;
   180	
   181	functionDefinition
   182	    : declarationSpecifiers directDeclarator LeftParen parameterList? RightParen compoundStatement
   183	    ;
   184	
   185
